steps.name: match header Content-Type contains 'application/json'
comments: # Valida que el Content-Type sea compatible con JSON

steps.name: def sessionCookie = responseCookies.JSESSIONID
comments: # Karate extrae automáticamente las cookies del header Set-Cookie a la variable responseCookies
